title: astragalus uncialis
intro: Astragalus uncialis, also known as the "Uncial Milk Vetch," is a plant species belonging to the legume family and is native to the mountainous regions of China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus uncialis include enhanced immune function, improved cardiovascular health, and reduced stress levels. In herbal preparations, the root and rhizome of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are available in health food stores and online.
